arts.ttl: Cesc Fàbregas: “Real Madrid can buy Nico Paz back, but at a certain price”
arts.sum: While Real Madrid retains a buy-back clause, Fàbregas made it clear in a recent press conference that Paz is at the heart of Como’s long-term vision. Como 1907 head coach Cesc Fàbregas has lavished praise on Nico Paz, the Argentine midfielder who has emerged as one of Serie A’s brightest talents this season.
